complaint_text: Customer reporting 7-day delay on expected 3-day delivery. Package still showing In Transit via Delhivery. Requested status update.
Customer reports the serum has a different texture than previous purchase. Batch MW-GS-30-NOV-23. Possible formula variation.
Inner seal of the face wash was broken on arrival. Customer concerned about contamination. Offered replacement.
Customer on Instagram reporting cystic acne after 3 weeks of biotin use. Pointed to FAQ about initial purge period. Customer not satisfied with response.
Amazon review flagged - customer says powder is clumpy and doesn't dissolve. Batch MW-IBP-200-NOV-23 checked. Advised on proper storage.
Customer reports sunscreen leaving white cast on their NC40 skin tone. Checked batch - correct formula. May be application technique. Offered video call consultation.
Package arrived with cracked glass jar. Cream had spilled. Customer requesting full replacement. Initiated replacement shipment.
Customer reporting skin redness and irritation after 2 days of use. Sensitive skin type not mentioned in product listing. Advised to discontinue and offered refund.
Nykaa review - customer says product is overpriced compared to similar products. Standard pricing response provided.
Delhivery delivered to wrong address. Customer in Bangalore. Package left at neighboring society. Retrieved same day. Apologized for inconvenience.
Customer reports gummies look discolored - darker than usual orange. Checked batch MW-BG-60-NOV-23. Within acceptable color variation range.
Resealable zip of inner pouch was defective - wouldn't seal properly. Advised on proper storage technique and offered replacement pouch.
Twitter complaint - customer says sunscreen caused closed comedones. Advised to check ingredients for potential triggers and offered alternative product.
1-star review citing product caused severe allergic reaction. Escalated to medical team. Requested photos of reaction. Customer referred to dermatologist.
Customer questioning if collagen in product is genuine marine or plant-based collagen. Product uses collagen-boosting peptides. Clarification sent.
Ekart tracking not updating for 4 days. Customer anxious. Contacted Ekart
resolved: package was at hub. Delivered next day.

complaint_text: Customer says oil leaks from the pump dispenser when the bottle is inverted. Known issue with small number of pumps from batch MW-HGO-100-NOV-23. Replacement sent.
Review about headaches after taking gummies. Not a documented side effect. Advised to take with food and water. Followed up after 1 week - resolved.
Batch received appears to be near expiry - only 2 months remaining. Customer purchased as gift. Full replacement with fresh batch sent.
Package shows delivered but not received. BlueDart investigation initiated. Package found at facility. Redelivered within 48 hours.
Instagram DM - customer says their serum has separated (oil layer on top). Normal for L-AA serums - advised to shake before use. Issue resolved.
Pump dispenser not working on new jar. Offered replacement pump or switch to pot format. Customer chose pot format.
Order placed Dec 15
resolved: arrived Dec 23 - 8 days. Expected 3-5 days. Delhivery peak season delays acknowledged. Partial refund of shipping fee offered.

complaint_text: Customer says face wash tube is nearly empty on first use - product not coming out properly. Tube was overfilled causing vacuum. Issue explained and replacement sent.
Customer saw competitor product at lower price. Standard competitive pricing response. Highlighted quality differentiators. Customer retained with loyalty discount.
Wrong variant delivered - got mango flavor instead of orange. Immediate replacement of correct variant initiated. Customer kept the wrong variant as compensation.
Customer says SPF50 is pilling under foundation. Advised application technique - allow full 5-min absorption before makeup. Issue resolved.
Facebook post about peeling skin after serum use. Customer has psoriasis - not disclosed. Advised to discontinue and consult dermatologist. Offered full refund.
Package not delivered over Christmas period. Delivery partner on holiday skeleton staff. Rescheduled for Jan 2. Customer satisfied with explanation.
Gift packaging requested but plain packaging delivered. Festive season system error. Sent proper gift packaging separately with apology note.
Customer reports serum oxidizing quickly - turning orange within 2 weeks of opening. Normal for L-AA serums exposed to air. Storage advice given. Replacement offered.
Dunzo last-mile delivery agent left package outside building in rain. Packaging damaged but product fine. Apology and partial refund provided.
1-star review about severe acne breakout. Escalated to product team. Customer provided with information about biotin and acne. Offered exchange for alternate product.
Twitter complaint about powder not mixing well in cold water. Advised to use warm water. Issue resolved. Customer satisfied.
Customer upset about recent price increase of Rs 50. Standard inflation/cost explanation provided. Loyalty discount offered for next purchase.
Customer says cream has separated - water on top. Emulsion stability issue. Batch MW-CNC-50-DEC-23 flagged for QC review. Immediate replacement sent.
Nykaa review - package arrived after 9 days. BlueDart transit delay. Standard apology response.
Outer box had printing error - wrong product name on box. Inner product was correct. Cosmetic issue only. New box offered.
Customer reports excessive dryness after face wash. Has very dry skin - not appropriate product for skin type. Recommended alternative face wash. Full refund given.
Gummies stuck together in bottle. Batch MW-BG-60-DEC-23 - humidity issue during storage. Full replacement sent.
Instagram complaint about sunscreen smell being different from usual. Fragrance supplier change acknowledged. No impact on efficacy. Customer offered refund.
Order placed Jan 8
resolved: still in transit Jan 15. Delhivery delay in Kolkata hub. Escalated to Delhivery. Delivered Jan 16. Partial refund offered.

complaint_text: Customer objects to price difference between website and Nykaa listing (Rs 100 difference). Platform pricing parity explained. Discount code for direct website purchase offered.
Doctor referred customer with suspected contact dermatitis from serum. Ingredient list shared with dermatologist. Product temporarily discontinued for this customer.
Pump dispenser leaking from base - oil pooling in outer packaging. Known issue with specific pump batch. Replacement with improved pump sent.
Reddit post about different-looking gummies in recent batch. Quality team investigating. Batch MW-BG-60-JAN-24 flagged for review. Post escalated to brand team.
Ekart updated tracking to delivered but package not received. Investigation opened. Refund issued after 72-hour investigation confirmed non-delivery.
Batch expired 3 months ago sold through retail store. URGENT. Store stock audit initiated. All old stock recalled from that location. Customer given full refund + compensation.
Review claiming received possibly fake product. Different smell and color. Escalated to brand protection team. Customer asked to send product for testing. OPEN - CRITICAL.
Package arrived damaged - glass jar cracked. Third such complaint this week from Delhivery shipments. Escalated to logistics team for investigation. Packaging review initiated.
Multiple ISA Reddit posts about fake products. Brand team alerted. Legal team investigating counterfeit claims. Response being drafted. ESCALATED TO MANAGEMENT.
Customer's order marked delivered by Delhivery but not received. 5th such case this week. Systematic issue suspected. Escalated to logistics director.
Inner bag seal broken on arrival. Possible contamination. Product use advised against until investigation complete. Full refund issued.
Order OD-2024-889922 - package marked delivered but not received. Delhivery fraud suspected. Police complaint advised. Full refund issued.
Twitter thread about delivery crisis going viral. 20+ cases identified in 24 hours. Emergency logistics meeting called. Delhivery escalation in progress. PR team alerted. CRISIS.
Customer reports gummies look and taste different from previous purchases - batch MW-BG-60-JAN-24. Quality team conducting urgent batch analysis. HOLD issued on this batch.
Cracked tube arrived via Delhivery. Product leaked. Order OD-2024-332255. Full refund issued. Delhivery complaint raised. Packaging review in progress.
Package 10 days late (Delhivery) and glass jar cracked. Customer extremely upset. Full refund + 50% off next order + personal apology email from team lead.
Reddit post with lab test results showing ingredient concentration mismatch. HIGHEST PRIORITY ESCALATION. CEO briefed. FSSAI complaint filed by customer. Legal + QC + PR teams engaged.
Customer threatening consumer court over 15-day lost package. Legal team notified. Full refund + gesture of goodwill Rs 500 credit. Still awaiting resolution from Delhivery.
